CustomField.description: Specifies which Opportunity Record Type(s) this naming rule applies to, stored as a semicolon-separated list of Record Type Developer Names. Only Opportunities with a matching Record Type will use this naming format. If blank, the naming rule applies to all Record Types not covered by a more specific rule. Multiple naming rules can target different Record Types to produce different name formats for different gift types (e.g., donations vs. grants).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Opportunity Record Type(s) this naming rule applies to. Leave blank to apply to all Record Types.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Record Types
